It builds on #454’s merged resolver, adds suggestion, receipt-backed stats, and doctor warnings without duplicating resolution logic or presets.","contradiction_caught":"#462 claims equivalent roster work but re-implements resolver behavior after #454.","contradiction_explanation":"#462 began from an older base, conflicts with the merged resolver, and introduces a second resolver module plus another minimal preset.","minority_finding":"#462 could contain independently useful ideas, but they should be ported selectively into the existing resolver path.","evidence":["#454 already merged packaged presets and fallback resolution in roster.py.","#463 extends that resolver and avoids a second resolver module, while #462 conflicts with it."]}
